---
name: Incorrect Tag
about: Report a tag which got removed, changed or renamed.
title: "[TAG]"
labels: incorrect tag
assignees: Lloyd159

---

**What's the name of the tag?**
The name of the tag including category. Example: dad in category misc
Note: if the tag name got renamed, put both the old and the new name of the tag here.

**What is the updated content of the tag?**
If the tag got changed, put a link to the new message send by the bot. Example: https://discord.com/channels/302094807046684672/752025169048109067/1504861771725537291
If the tag got removed or renamed, put a link to the message where the bot says that the old tag doesn't exist.

**Additional context**
Add any other context or information here.
